Field.name: PrimaryKey
Field.comment: Unique identifier of each record in this table

Field.name: CreationTimestamp
Field.comment: Date and time each record was created

Field.name: CreatedBy
Field.comment: Account name of the user who created each record

Field.name: ModificationTimestamp
Field.comment: Date and time each record was last modified

Field.name: ModifiedBy
Field.comment: Account name of the user who last modified each record

Calculation.Text: Let ( [ json1 = FAT Block @ Page item::BlockJSON; json2 = Substitute ( json1 ; ["*t1*" ; Case(IsEmpty(FAT Block @ Page item::Text 1 JSON embed); FAT Page item::Text 1 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF PI Text 1::Text))] ; ["*t2*" ; Case(IsEmpty(FAT Block @ Page item::Text 2 JSON embed); FAT Page item::Text 2 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF PI Text 2::Text))] ; ["*t3*" ; Case(IsEmpty(FAT Block @ Page item::Text 3 JSON embed); FAT Page item::Text 3 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF PI Text 3::Text))] ; ["*t4*" ; Case(IsEmpty(FAT Block @ Page item::Text 4 JSON embed); FAT Page item::Text 4 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF PI Text 4::Text)) ]; ["*t5*" ; Case(IsEmpty(FAT Block @ Page item::Text 5 JSON embed); FAT Page item::Text 5 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF PI Text 5::Text)) ]; ["*t6*" ; Case(IsEmpty(FAT Block @ Page item::Text 6 JSON embed); FAT Page item::Text 6 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF PI Text 6::Text)) ]; ["*t7*" ; Case(IsEmpty(FAT Block @ Page item::Text 7 JSON embed); FAT Page item::Text 7 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF PI Text 7::Text)) ]; ["*c1*" ; "" ]; ["*c2*" ; "" ]; ["}" ; ""] ); json3 = json2 & Case ( ValueCount ( FAT ModifierValue @ Page item::Value JSON ) = 0 ; "" ; ", " & Substitute ( List ( FAT ModifierValue @ Page item::Value JSON ) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "" ) & "}"; json5 = Case ( Not IsEmpty (Media PI 1::playAsNativeVideo) ; JSONSetElement ( json3 ; "native" ; "yes"; JSONString ); json3 ); json6 = Case ( Left ( Media PI 1::Media JSON ; 1 )= "{" ; JSONSetElement ( json5 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override media 1 JSON ; Media PI 1::Media JSON ; JSONObject ); JSONSetElement ( json5 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override media 1 JSON ; Media PI 1::Media JSON ; JSONString ) ); json7 = Case(IsEmpty(Media PI 2::Media JSON); json6; Case ( Left ( Media PI 2::Media JSON ; 1 )= "{" ; JSONSetElement ( json6 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override media 2 JSON ; Media PI 2::Media JSON ; JSONObject ); JSONSetElement ( json6 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override media 2 JSON ; Media PI 2::Media JSON ; JSONString ) )); json8 = JSONSetElement ( json7 ; ["id" ; PrimaryKey ; JSONString ]; [ "parent_id" ; Parent id ; JSONString ]; [ "ios" ; IOs JSON ; JSONObject ]; [ "io_id" ; Case ( IO id array Legacy ≠ ""; IO id array Legacy; FAT IO @ Page item Legacy::IO InputTargetDataKey) ; JSONString ]; [ "valuelist_name" ; FAT List @ Page item::Name ; JSONString ]; [ "valuelist_id" ; List id ; JSONString ]; [ "content_array" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT List item @ Page item::List Item PI JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray] ; [ "media_containers" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (PrettifyDash(Media LI PI 1::Container original filename)) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ] ; [ "parent_type" ; "page" ; JSONString ] ; [ "type" ; "page-item" ; JSONString ] ; [ "tags" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Tag Value @ PI::Tag Value JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ] ; [ "score_value" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Score Value @ PI::Score Value JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ] ; [ "score_condition" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Score Condititon @ PI::Score condition JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ] ; [ "sort_index" ; SortIndex ; JSONNumber ]; [ "display_text" ; DisplayText ; JSONString ] ) ]; JSONFormatElements (json8 ) )

Field.name: Navigate to
Field.comment: For page items that are based on prototype navigation button

Field.name: Navigate to item id
Field.comment: For page items that are based on prototype navigation button

Field.name: Page item changed
Field.comment: False when not changed, true when changed. Set by Quill HTML web viewer

Calculation.Text: /* HTML Parameters */ Let ( [ a = ModificationTimestamp; // hack to force re-calculation of auto-enter calculation trans = Case ( FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage ; " TRANS" ; "" ); textArr = While ( [ i=1; jsontext="[" ]; i ≤ FAT Block @ Page item::Number of text fields ; [ jsontext = jsontext & Case( i=1; ""; ",") & JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["id" ; GetAsText ( i ) ; JSONString]; ["label" ; GetField ( "FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text " & GetAsText(i)) ; JSONString]; ["html" ; Case ( GetField ( "FAT Block @ Page item::Text " & GetAsText(i) & " HTML format") = "" ; False ; True ) ; JSONBoolean ]; ["value" ; sanitizeHTML(GetField("TF PI Text " & GetAsText ( i ) & trans & "::Text")); JSONString ] ) ; i = i + 1 ]; jsontext & "]" ); json = JSONSetElement ( "{}" ; ["environment" ; Case ( Platform="WebDirect"; "web"; "FileMaker") ; JSONString]; ["record-id" ; Get(recordID) ; JSONNumber]; ["localisation_mode" ; Case(FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage; "translate"; "original"); JSONString]; ["edit_mode" ; "pageItem"; JSONString]; ["localisation_code" ; FAT Page item::Current localisation code ; JSONString]; ["texts" ; textArr ; JSONArray] ) ]; json )

Let ( [ a = ModificationTimestamp; // hack to force re-calculation of auto-enter calculation t1 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PI Text 1::Text); ""; TF PI Text 1::Display text & " "); t2 = Case(Not IsEmpty (t1) Or IsEmpty(TF PI Text 2::Text); ""; TF PI Text 2::Display text & " "); t3 = Case(Not IsEmpty (t1 & t2) Or IsEmpty(TF PI Text 3::Text); ""; TF PI Text 3::Display text & " "); t4 = Case(Not IsEmpty (t1 & t2 & t3) Or IsEmpty(TF PI Text 4::Text); ""; TF PI Text 4::Display text & " "); t5 = Case(Not IsEmpty (t1 & t2 & t3 & t4) Or IsEmpty(TF PI Text 5::Text); ""; TF PI Text 5::Display text & " "); t6 = Case(Not IsEmpty (t1 & t2 & t3 & t4 & t5) Or IsEmpty(TF PI Text 6::Text); ""; TF PI Text 6::Display text & " "); t7 = Case(Not IsEmpty (t1 & t2 & t3 & t4 & t5 & t6) Or IsEmpty(TF PI Text 7::Text); ""; TF PI Text 7::Display text & " "); t8 = Case(Not IsEmpty (t1 & t2 & t3 & t4 & t5 & t6 & t7) Or Count(TF Subtitle Media PI::PrimaryKey)=0; ""; Substitute (List (TF Subtitle Media PI::Display text); "¶"; " " ) & " "); t9 = t1 & t2 & t3 & t4 & t5 & t6 & t7 & t8; t10 = Substitute ( TruncateText(t9;50); "¶"; " "); t11 = Case(IsEmpty(t10); "(" & FAT Block @ Page item::Name & ")"; t10 & " (" & FAT Block @ Page item::Name & ")") ]; t11 ) /* Let ( [ a = ModificationTimestamp; // hack to force re-calculation of auto-enter calculation text = Case ( TF PI Text 1::Text ="" and TF PI Text 2::Text = "" and TF PI Text 3::Text = "" and TF PI Text 4::Text = "" and TF PI Text 5::Text = ""; FAT Block @ Page item::Name; TF PI Text 1::Text ="" and TF PI Text 2::Text = "" and TF PI Text 3::Text = "" and TF PI Text 4::Text = ""; TF PI Text 5::Display text; TF PI Text 1::Text ="" and TF PI Text 2::Text = "" and TF PI Text 3::Text = ""; TF PI Text 4::Display text; TF PI Text 1::Text ="" and TF PI Text 2::Text = ""; TF PI Text 3::Display text; TF PI Text 1::Text =""; TF PI Text 2::Display text; TF PI Text 1::Display text) ] ; Text & " (" & FAT Block @ Page item::Name & ")" )*/

Field.name: IO id array Legacy
Field.comment: If more than one IO id. Comma separated list of ids.

Field.name: List id
Field.comment: This is the new valuelist from March 2022

Calculation.Text: Case ( Not FAT IO Value @ Page item::PrimaryKey; "" ; While ( [ i=0 ; listOfIOValueJSON = List(FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO Value JSON); listOfIOarrays = List(FAT IO Value @ Page item::IO Array); ios_json = "{}"; io_array = "[]"; io_object_array = "[]"; io_object_array_label = PrettifyUnderScore(BlockTemplate @ Page item::Label IO Array) ]; i < Count(FAT IO Value @ Page item::PrimaryKey) ; [ i = i + 1; io_array= Case ( GetValue ( listOfIOarrays; i)=1 ; JSONSetElement ( io_array ; JSONArrayLength ( io_array ) ; JSONGetElement ( GetValue ( listOfIOValueJSON; i) ; "id" ) ; JSONString ); io_array ); item_name = JSONGetElement ( GetValue ( listOfIOValueJSON; i) ; "friendly_label_id" ); item_json = Case ( GetValue ( listOfIOarrays; i)=1 Or JSONGetElement ( GetValue ( listOfIOValueJSON; i) ; "id" ) = "" ; "" ; GetValue ( listOfIOValueJSON; i)); ios_json = Case ( item_json = "" ; ios_json ; JSONSetElement ( ios_json ; item_name; item_json ; JSONObject )); io_object_array= Case ( GetValue ( listOfIOarrays; i)=1 ; JSONSetElement ( io_object_array ; JSONArrayLength ( io_object_array ) ; GetValue ( listOfIOValueJSON; i) ; JSONObject ); io_object_array ) ] ; Let( [ ios_json1 = JSONSetElement ( ios_json ; "read_ios" ; io_array ; JSONArray ); ios_json2 = Case ( IsEmpty(io_object_array_label) ; ios_json1 ; JSONSetElement ( ios_json1 ; io_object_array_label ; io_object_array ; JSONArray )) ]; ios_json2 ) ) )

Let ( [ json1 = FAT Block @ Page item::BlockJSON; json2 = Substitute ( json1 ; ["*t1*" ; Case(IsEmpty(FAT Block @ Page item::Text 1 JSON embed); FAT Page item::Text 1 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF PI Text 1::Text))] ; ["*t2*" ; Case(IsEmpty(FAT Block @ Page item::Text 2 JSON embed); FAT Page item::Text 2 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF PI Text 2::Text))] ; ["*t3*" ; Case(IsEmpty(FAT Block @ Page item::Text 3 JSON embed); FAT Page item::Text 3 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF PI Text 3::Text))] ; ["*t4*" ; Case(IsEmpty(FAT Block @ Page item::Text 4 JSON embed); FAT Page item::Text 4 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF PI Text 4::Text)) ]; ["*t5*" ; Case(IsEmpty(FAT Block @ Page item::Text 5 JSON embed); FAT Page item::Text 5 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF PI Text 5::Text)) ]; ["*t6*" ; Case(IsEmpty(FAT Block @ Page item::Text 6 JSON embed); FAT Page item::Text 6 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF PI Text 6::Text)) ]; ["*t7*" ; Case(IsEmpty(FAT Block @ Page item::Text 7 JSON embed); FAT Page item::Text 7 id; GetAsURLEncoded (TF PI Text 7::Text)) ]; ["*c1*" ; "" ]; ["*c2*" ; "" ]; ["}" ; ""] ); json3 = json2 & Case ( ValueCount ( FAT ModifierValue @ Page item::Value JSON ) = 0 ; "" ; ", " & Substitute ( List ( FAT ModifierValue @ Page item::Value JSON ) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "" ); json4 = json3 & Case ( ValueCount ( <Table Missing>::<Field Missing> ) = 0 ; "}" ; ", " & Substitute ( List ( <Table Missing>::<Field Missing> ) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "}" ); json5 = Case ( Not IsEmpty (Media PI 1::playAsNativeVideo) ; JSONSetElement ( json4 ; "native" ; "yes"; JSONString ); json4 ); json6 = Case ( Left ( Media PI 1::Media JSON ; 1 )= "{" ; JSONSetElement ( json5 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override media 1 JSON ; Media PI 1::Media JSON ; JSONObject ); JSONSetElement ( json5 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override media 1 JSON ; Media PI 1::Media JSON ; JSONString ) ); json7 = Case(IsEmpty(FAT Page item::Media 2 id); json6; Case ( Left ( Media PI 2::Media JSON ; 1 )= "{" ; JSONSetElement ( json6 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override media 2 JSON ; Media PI 2::Media JSON ; JSONObject ); JSONSetElement ( json6 ; FAT Block @ Page item::Label override media 2 JSON ; Media PI 2::Media JSON ; JSONString ) )); json8 = JSONSetElement ( json7 ; ["id" ; PrimaryKey ; JSONString ]; [ "parent_id" ; Parent id ; JSONString ]; [ "ios" ; IOs JSON ; JSONObject ]; [ "io_id" ; Case ( IO id array Legacy ≠ ""; IO id array Legacy; FAT IO @ Page item Legacy::IO InputTargetDataKey) ; JSONString ]; [ "valuelist_name" ; FAT List @ Page item::Name ; JSONString ]; [ "valuelist_id" ; List id ; JSONString ]; [ "content_array" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT List item @ Page item::List Item PI JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray] ; [ "media_containers" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (PrettifyDash(Media LI PI 1::Container original filename)) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ] ; [ "parent_type" ; "page" ; JSONString ] ; [ "type" ; "page-item" ; JSONString ] ; [ "tags" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Tag Value @ PI::Tag Value JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ] ; [ "score_value" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Score Value @ PI::Score Value JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ] ; [ "score_condition" ; "[" & Substitute ( List (FAT Score Condititon @ PI::Score condition JSON) ; ¶ ; ", " ) & "]" ; JSONArray ] ; [ "sort_index" ; SortIndex ; JSONNumber ]; [ "display_text" ; DisplayText ; JSONString ] ) ]; JSONFormatElements (json8 ) )

Field.name: Include in export
Field.comment: Decides if item will be included in export or not.

Field.name: LastAdaptiveSettingsTab
Field.comment: Panel for Tags, Score change and Score conditions

Calculation.Text: Let ( [ a = ModificationTimestamp; // hack to force re-calculation of auto-enter calculation bb = TextStyleAdd ( "Block: "; Bold) & FAT Block @ Page item::Name & "¶¶"; t1 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PI Text 1::Text); ""; TextStyleAdd ( FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 1 & ": "; Bold) & TF PI Text 1::Display text & "¶¶" ); t2 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PI Text 2::Text); ""; TextStyleAdd ( FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 2 & ": "; Bold) & TF PI Text 2::Display text & "¶¶"); t3 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PI Text 3::Text); ""; TextStyleAdd ( FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 3 & ": "; Bold) & TF PI Text 3::Display text & "¶¶"); t4 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PI Text 4::Text); ""; TextStyleAdd ( FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 4 & ": "; Bold) & TF PI Text 4::Display text & "¶¶"); t5 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PI Text 5::Text); ""; TextStyleAdd ( FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 5 & ": "; Bold) & TF PI Text 5::Display text & "¶¶"); t6 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PI Text 6::Text); ""; TextStyleAdd ( FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 6 & ": "; Bold) & TF PI Text 6::Display text & "¶¶"); t7 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PI Text 7::Text); ""; TextStyleAdd ( FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 7 & ": "; Bold) & TF PI Text 7::Display text & "¶¶"); t8 = Case(Count(TF Subtitle Media PI::PrimaryKey)=0; ""; TextStyleAdd ( "Media subtitle : "; Bold) & Substitute (List (TF Subtitle Media PI::Display text); "¶"; " " ) & "¶¶"); t9 = Case(IsEmpty(List id); ""; TextStyleAdd ( "List: "; Bold) & FAT List @ Page item::Name & "¶" & List(FAT List item @ List @ Page item::DisplayTextOrValue) & "¶"); t10 = Case(Count(FAT List item @ Page item::DisplayTextOrValue)=0; ""; TextStyleAdd ( "Page item list: "; Bold) & "¶" & List(FAT List item @ Page item::DisplayTextOrValue) & "¶"); t11 = Case(Count(FAT IO @ Page item::PrimaryKey) = 0; ""; TextStyleAdd ( "IO : "; Bold) & Substitute ( FAT IO @ Page item::Name ; "¶" ; ", " ) & "¶¶"); t12 = Case(IsEmpty(IO id Legacy); ""; TextStyleAdd ( "Legacy IO : "; Bold) & FAT IO @ Page item Legacy::Name & "¶¶"); cmt = Case(IsEmpty(Comment); ""; TextStyleAdd ( "Comment" & ": "; Bold+Italic) & TextStyleAdd (Comment; Italic) & "¶¶"); t13 = Case(Count(FAT ModifierValue @ Page item::PrimaryKey) = 0; ""; TextStyleAdd ( "Modifier settings : ¶"; Bold) & List(FAT ModifierValue @ Page item::Value JSON) & "¶¶") ]; bb & t1 & t2 & t3 & t4 & t5 & t6 & t7 & t8 & t9 & t10 & t11 & cmt & t12 & t13 )
0+ Sum ( FAT List item @ Page item::NumberOfTagValues)
0 + Sum ( FAT List item @ Page item::NumberOfScoreValues)
0 + Sum ( FAT List item @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions)

Field.name: Old PrimaryKey from clone
Field.comment: If item is cloned this id is used for reference in clone script

Field.name: gCurrentIOValue
Field.comment: A global field that helps display a portal (Input field values) in a portal (IO values)

Field.name: LastSettingTab
Field.comment: Panel for Basic or Advanced tools

Field.name: gDisplayExtendedInformation
Field.comment: Used when displaying search result of page items - displays IO information

Calculation.Text: Let ( [ m1 = Media 1; m2 = Media 2; m1_image = isDisplayableMedia (Media PI 1::Container original filename); m1_video = Case ( Media PI 1::Container file extension = "mp4"; 1; 0); m2_image = isDisplayableMedia (Media PI 2::Container original filename); displaymedia = Case ( m1_image; m1; //m1_video; GetThumbnail ( m1 ; 80 ; 45 ); m2_image; m2; "" ) ]; displaymedia )

Let ( [ a = ModificationTimestamp; // hack to force re-calculation of auto-enter calculation bb = TextStyleAdd ( "Block: "; Bold) & FAT Block @ Page item::Name & "¶"; t1 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PI Text 1::Text); ""; TextStyleAdd ( FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 1 & ": "; Bold) & TF PI Text 1::Display text & "¶" ); t2 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PI Text 2::Text); ""; TextStyleAdd ( FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 2 & ": "; Bold) & TF PI Text 2::Display text & "¶"); t3 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PI Text 3::Text); ""; TextStyleAdd ( FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 3 & ": "; Bold) & TF PI Text 3::Display text & "¶"); t4 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PI Text 4::Text); ""; TextStyleAdd ( FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 4 & ": "; Bold) & TF PI Text 4::Display text & "¶"); t5 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PI Text 5::Text); ""; TextStyleAdd ( FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 5 & ": "; Bold) & TF PI Text 5::Display text & "¶"); t6 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PI Text 6::Text); ""; TextStyleAdd ( FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 6 & ": "; Bold) & TF PI Text 6::Display text & "¶"); t7 = Case(IsEmpty(TF PI Text 7::Text); ""; TextStyleAdd ( FAT Block @ Page item::Label override text 7 & ": "; Bold) & TF PI Text 7::Display text & "¶"); t8 = Case(Count(TF Subtitle Media PI::PrimaryKey)=0; ""; TextStyleAdd ( "Media subtitle : "; Bold) & Substitute (List (TF Subtitle Media PI::Display text); "¶"; " " ) & "¶") ]; bb & t1 & t2 & t3 & t4 & t5 & t6 & t7 & t8 )
